Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Interrogatories And Motion For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Ronald Snodgrass
Off Calendar Aug-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance stated.

Plaintiff Tina Laney's Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted And Request For Monetary Sanctions is ordered off calendar. The notice was insufficient per C.C.P. Sections 1005 and 1013. The first day for which this motion could have been calendared is September 2, 2008. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
